parentQuestion: The 'rough' in rough endoplasmic reticulum refers to ___.

scaffolds.q: Ribosomes are the organelles responsible for making ___.
scaffolds.explain: Ribosomes are the sites of protein synthesis. They read mRNA instructions and assemble amino acids into proteins. They're molecular 3D printers. Open your mind to this:impressed, darling.

scaffolds.q: The endoplasmic reticulum (ER) is a network of ___ within the cell.
scaffolds.explain: The ER is an extensive network of membranous tubes and sacs. It comes in two forms: rough ER (with ribosomes) and smooth ER (without ribosomes). Think of it as the cell's internal highway system. Navigate this together:.
